name: denver17/membership-steps
title: Membership Steps
description: Three-step membership funnel. Each step has a photo, title, and body copy.

step1Body.default: Visit the bar, meet some members, see what Jolly Corks is about. No pressure. Just cold drinks and real people.

step2Body.default: Open to all. A short application, a sponsor from inside the lodge, and you’re on your way. Most people wonder why they waited.

step3Body.default: Member pricing on drinks, golf simulator access, invites to events, and a lodge that’s had your back since 1882.
